zh.lifeSummary: 當Hans Heinrich Hanses於1560年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯文特波格阿爾騰費爾德時，他的父親Severus Hanses Schroder20歲，母親Gesche Schroder20歲。他於1591年6月4日與Gertrude Thielen在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯史馬倫格波德費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1636年在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯史馬倫格波德費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hans Heinrich Hanses于1560年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯文特波格阿爾騰費爾德时，他的父亲Severus Hanses Schroder20岁，母亲Gesche Schroder20岁。他于1591年6月4日与Gertrude Thielen在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯史馬倫格波德費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1636年在他的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯史馬倫格波德費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Hanses
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Khanke (a pet form of Khane, from Hebrew Ḥanna; see Hanna 6), with the Yiddish possessive suffix -s.

variants.name: Hanks
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hanke, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In England this personal name was a shortened form of both Hankin and Hancock , both of which were used as pet forms of Henry . The equivalent Middle Dutch names Hanke and Hankin, however, had the sense ‘young John’ and may have been introduced to England by Flemish settlers after the Conquest. There is no evidence to support the suggestion that an English hereditary surname was formed from the Old Norse personal name Anki, a diminutive of personal names such as Arngrim and Arnketill.

nameMeanings.name: Hans

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Hans Heinrich Hanses was born in 1560, in Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Severus Hanses Schroder, was 20 and his mother, Gesche Schroder, was 20. He married Gertrude Thielen on 4 June 1591, in Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1636, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hans Heinrich Hanses est né en 1560, à Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Severus Hanses Schroder, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Gesche Schroder, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Gertrude Thielen le 4 juin 1591, à Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1636, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hans Heinrich Hanses 1560 in Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Severus Hanses Schroder 20 und seine Mutter Gesche Schroder 20. Er hat am 4. Juni 1591 in Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Gertrude Thielen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1636 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Heinrich Hanses è nato il nel 1560 nel Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Severus Hanses Schroder, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Gesche Schroder, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Gertrude Thielen il 4 giugno 1591, nel Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1636, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Hans Heinrich Hansesが1560年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイスウィンテルバーグアルテンフエルドで生まれた時，父Severus Hanses Schroderは20歳，母Gesche Schroderは20歳であった。1591年6月4日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイススチマレンバーグブoデフエルドでGertrude Thielenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1636年に故郷で76歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイススチマレンバーグブoデフエルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hans Heinrich Hanses(이)가 1560년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 윈터버그 알텐펠드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Severus Hanses Schroder(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Gesche Schroder(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1591년 6월 4일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 슈몰버그 브o데펠드에서 Gertrude Thielen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1636년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 슈몰버그 브o데펠드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Heinrich Hanses nasceu em 1560, em Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Severus Hanses Schroder, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Gesche Schroder, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrude Thielen em 4 de junho de 1591, em Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1636, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hans Heinrich Hanses родился в 1560 г. в местности алтенфелд, винтирбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Severus Hanses Schroder было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Gesche Schroder, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrude Thielen 4 июня 1591 г. в местности бoдефелд, щмалленбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1636 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности бoдефелд, щмалленбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hans Heinrich Hanses nació en 1560, en Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Severus Hanses Schroder, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Gesche Schroder, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Gertrude Thielen el 4 de junio de 1591, en Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1636, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
